source.title: FATMIR ALISPAHIĆ- Bošnjačka kleropolitika tjera Hrvate iz Sarajeva PODCAST ČUŠPAJZ #136

summary.title_hr: FATMIR ALISPAHIĆ- Bošnjačka kleropolitika tjera Hrvate iz Sarajeva PODCAST ČUŠPAJZ #136
summary.abstract_hr: U ovoj epizodi podcasta Čušpajz, novinar i publicist Fatmir Alispahić objašnjava razloge svog odlaska iz Bosne i Hercegovine, navodeći prijetnje, napade i institucionalni progon. Kritizira bošnjačku kleropolitiku, koju smatra najvećom opasnošću za Bošnjake, tvrdeći da ih ona vodi u "rezervat" i samouizolaciju. Alispahić ističe korupciju u pravosuđu i utjecaj stranih sila, te naglašava važnost dobrih bošnjačko-hrvatskih odnosa kao ključnih za opstanak BiH i europske vrijednosti. Razgovor se dotiče i teme nacionalizma, mladih generacija te mogućnosti pomirenja kroz sport.
key_topics: utjecaj Turske i Izraela na BiH
key_points: Fatmir Alispahić opisuje višegodišnji progon, uključujući fizičke napade, prijetnje smrću i oduzimanje novinarske opreme, što ga je primoralo na privremeni odlazak iz BiH.
Kritizira glavnog tužitelja Vedrana Aleđanovića koji je napadače na njega opravdao "drskim narativom" novinara, te ministra obrane Zukana Heleza zbog javnih optužbi koje su potaknule prijetnje.
Smatra da bošnjačka kleropolitika, predvođena Islamskom zajednicom i SDA, vodi Bošnjake u "rezervat" i samouizolaciju, čineći ih "drugim Palestincima".
Naglašava da Bošnjacima najveća opasnost prijeti od vlastite kleropolitičke mafije, a ne od Srba ili Hrvata, te da je ta mafija povezana s obavještajnim službama i kriminalom.
Ističe da izbor Željka Komšića kao hrvatskog predstavnika predstavlja nasilje koje gura Hrvate prema trećem entitetu, što dugoročno slabi Bosnu i Hercegovinu.
Poziva Bošnjake da se probude i shvate da je europski način života i dobri odnosi s Hrvatima ključni za opstanak BiH, te da odbace utjecaj Turske.
Vidi nadu u sportskim uspjesima reprezentacije BiH, koja okuplja sve narode, kao primjer mogućeg pomirenja i zajedništva.
summary.title_en: FATMIR ALISPAHIĆ- Bosniak clerico-politics drives Croats from Sarajevo PODCAST ČUŠPAJZ #136
summary.abstract_en: In this episode of the podcast Čušpajz, journalist and publicist Fatmir Alispahić explains the reasons for his departure from Bosnia and Herzegovina, citing threats, attacks, and institutional persecution. He criticizes Bosniak cleropolitics, which he considers the greatest danger for Bosniaks, claiming that it leads them into a "reservation" and self-isolation. Alispahić highlights corruption in the judiciary and the influence of foreign powers, and emphasizes the importance of good Bosniak-Croatian relations as crucial for the survival of BiH and European values. The conversation also touches upon the topic of nationalism, young generations, and the possibility of reconciliation through sports.
key_topics_en: political persecution and threats to journalists
corruption in the judiciary of BiH
influence of Turkey and Israel on BiH
the future of Bosnia and Herzegovina and "reserve"
key_points_en: Fatmir Alispahić describes multi-year persecution, including physical attacks, death threats, and confiscation of journalistic equipment, which forced him to a temporary departure from BiH.

He criticizes the chief prosecutor Vedran Aleđanović who justified the attackers on him with the 'insolent narrative' of journalists, and the Minister of Defense Zukan Helez due to public accusations which incited threats.
He believes that Bosniak cleropolitics, led by the Islamic Community and SDA, leads Bosniaks into a "reservation" and self-isolation, making them "other Palestinians".
He emphasizes that the greatest danger to Bosniaks comes from their own clerico-political mafia, and not from Serbs or Croats, and that this mafia is connected with intelligence services and crime.
He points out that the election of Željko Komšić as the Croatian representative represents violence which pushes Croats towards a third entity, which long-term weakens Bosnia and Herzegovina.
He calls on Bosniaks to wake up and realize that the European way of life and good relations with Croats are crucial for the survival of BiH, and to reject the influence of Turkey.
He sees hope in the sports successes of the BiH national team, which gathers all peoples, as an example of possible reconciliation and unity.
mentioned_organizations_en: Ministry of Internal Affairs of Tuzla Canton
